calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Inventory And Appraisal

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-17-2026 Granted Per Written Order
TENTATIVE RULING: Hearing for the sole purpose of admitting the will dated 4/21/2019. No appearance is required. The Court will waive notice to the two minors; however, the ages of minors should always be set forth and notice must also be given to the person having legal custody of the minor with whom the minor resides.
Status hearing will be set on 10/26/26 for filing the I&A. If the I&A is not filed by 10/16/26, an appearance will be required on 10/26/26.
Status hearing will be set on 12/20/27 for closing the estate. If a petition for final distribution or a report of status with a petition requesting additional time for estate administration is filed at least two weeks before that status hearing date, no appearance will be required on that date.

EXAMINER: HELEN TROWBRIDGE
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated April 21, 2019 is admitted to probate. Myriam De La Jara is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on filing inventory and appraisal is set for October 26, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If the inventory and appraisal is not filed October 16, 2026, an appearance will be required on October 26, 2026. Status on close of estate is set for December 20, 2027 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Michael Kasolas is appointed Probate Referee. Disclosure: The assigned probate referee is married to a legal advisory staff member of this court.

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-27-2026 Continued To Jun-17-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
